query: /devops-engineer pipeline Node.js app with npm, jest tests, Docker build, deploy to staging on push to main
expected_behavior: Agent activates devops-engineer skill in Generate mode
Agent gathers requirements: Node.js, npm, jest, Docker, staging deployment
Agent loads references/github-actions-patterns.md for workflow patterns
Agent generates a complete GitHub Actions workflow YAML with: checkout, setup-node with cache, npm ci, jest tests, Docker build, staging deploy
Agent pins all actions to full SHA
Agent adds concurrency group for deployment
Agent sets timeout-minutes on every job
Agent includes inline comments explaining non-obvious configuration
Agent runs workflow-analyzer.py to validate the generated workflow
